Optional Netori

Overview

Yamada Anna is the girlfriend of Kyotaro Ichikawa. They have been dating for over two years, and their relationship has been deteriorating due to Ichikawa being too much of a pouahssy. And oh, Yamada may like you more than her own boyfriend, maybe.
